name: k8s-change-assistant-mcp-app
description: MCP App demo: Kubernetes Change Assistant

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build
scripts.start: concurrently --raw "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build --watch" "tsx watch main.ts"
